title: SV: Multiple packages leads to crash

features.name: cross_package_virtual_class_inheritance
features.description: Code should include a virtual class defined in one package and extended in another package via wildcard import
features.snippet: package p1; virtual class uvm_test; endclass; endpackage; package p2; import p1::*; class sanity_test extends uvm_test; endclass; endpackage

features.name: module_imports_multiple_packages_with_inheritance
features.description: Code should include a module that imports multiple packages where one package extends a class from another package
features.snippet: package p1; virtual class uvm_test; endclass; endpackage; package p2; import p1::*; class sanity_test extends uvm_test; endclass; endpackage; module m; import p1::*; import p2::*; endmodule
